journal_entry.description: Purchase of promotional literature for sales department
journal_entry.rationale: Promotional literature for customer reference is a marketing/sales asset (supplies or prepaid marketing materials). Since these are titles to be displayed for ongoing customer reference rather than immediately consumed, they represent an asset. HST 13% is recoverable on this business purchase in Ontario. Cash decreases.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Promotional literature for customer reference is capitalized as a marketing asset (Marketing Supplies). HST 13% (ON) is recoverable on business purchases. One asset increases (Marketing Supplies), one asset decreases (Cash), plus HST receivable.
